metadata.title: Force note view mode
metadata.description: Force note view mode Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Never change the view mode on a note which was already open.
ast.target: 永不更改已打开笔记的视图模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Never change the view mode on a note that was opened from another one in a certain view mode
ast.target: 永不更改从另一个以特定视图模式打开的笔记的视图模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Debounce timeout is the time in milliseconds after which the view mode is set. Set "0" to disable debouncing (default value is "300"). If you experience issues with the plugin, try increasing this value.
ast.target: 防抖超时是设置视图模式之前的毫秒数。设置为“0”可禁用防抖（默认值为“300”）。如果插件出现问题，请尝试增加此值。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Ignore force view when not in frontmatter
ast.target: 不在前置信息中时忽略强制视图

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Add another folder to the list
ast.target: 向列表添加另一个文件夹

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Add another file to the list
ast.target: 向列表添加另一个文件
